other_observers: Lisa Edwards; We found this bird, as far as I know.
description: I was scanning (with binoculars) a body of water with ducks on it, when I saw what I thought looked like a male Eurasian Wigeon. I quickly got the scope out, and it indeed was a male Eurasian Wigeon. The red head, with cream yellow color crown, and gray sides were all seen. Photos included. Nothing about the bird, looked like a hybrid to me.Behaviors: Swimming with Gadwalls and American Coots.Call: nonePlumage: adult
photographer: Photographer: Brandon Percival, Brandon Percival, Brandon Percival
